scripts.dev:client: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w server
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:shared && npm run prisma:generate && npm run check:client && npm run check:server && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.check: npm run build:shared && npm run prisma:generate && npm run check:client && npm run check:server
scripts.start:local-production: cross-env NODE_ENV=production CLIENT_URLS=http://localhost:4173 npm run start -w server
